text: Heads up: I pulled 2 damaged adult kote (size L) from Shelf B-upper today. Torn palmar stitching on both. Tagged them red and moved to B-lower. Airtable updated.
Thanks Raj. @aaron we'll need replacements before the tournament. Can you check with Budo Supply?
On it. I'll get a quote from Budo Supply tomorrow. 2 replacement adult kote L, plus we might want extra shinai.
Registration update: we're at 12 so far (8 adult, 4 youth). Need to push marketing this week.
I'll boost the Instagram ad and send a reminder to the mailing list.
Equipment audit is scheduled for Jan 5. I'll head to the dojo in the morning to do the full count and photos.
Reminder: Saturday open practice this week has Raj leading. I'll be at the PNKF regional meeting.
Anyone tried the new ramen place on Division? Thinking of taking Elena there for date night.
Yes! The tonkotsu is amazing. Get the spicy miso if you like heat.
FYI - I'm going to recommend David Park for tournament assistant referee. He's been solid in practice bouts.
